description: Frozen fixture of CC transcript line shapes used by the codegraph-first gate scan predicate. Captured from real session bd4d5baf (scrubbed), CC 2.1.157. Contains positives (mcp_direct, toolsearch_select) and negatives (non_codegraph_tool, user_tool_result, toolsearch_noncodegraph). If check_codegraph_transcript_format fails, re-capture from a fresh session transcript and update _line_is_codegraph_toolcall if the format changed.

invariants.tool_use_block_has_type_and_name: tool_use blocks have 'type'=='tool_use' and a 'name' key
invariants.toolsearch_query: ToolSearch codegraph-select queries contain 'mcp__codegraph__' in input.query
